title: Box: The Game
description:
You play as a cube and every cube you touch attaches to you and every cube those cubes touch attach to them.

The goal is to make the shape on the ground with the colours in the correct spot.Compete with people from all around the world to try and get the least amount of moves using the leaderboard.• 50 Levels

• Colour blind mode

• Colourful levels

• Cool shapes

• Challenging puzzles

• Leaderboards
description_short: Box: The Game is a fun puzzle game which will challenge your brain to think in different ways. All cubes attach to each other, your goal is to match the displayed shape to continue to the next level.
